title: Coespeletia marcanoana
taxonomy: Coespeletia marcanoana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to Venezuela. The plant belongs to the genus Coespeletia. Coespeletia marcanoana is a shrub or small tree that grows in the mountainous regions of Venezuela. It is a member of the sunflower family and is known for its unique characteristics.
